Terms of Service

Effective Date: March 4, 2026

Last Updated: March 4, 2026

Agreement to Terms

By accessing or using ContractorSoftwareHub.com (the “Site”), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service (“Terms”). If you do not agree to these Terms, please do not use the Site.

The Site is operated by Contractor Software Hub LLC, a Tennessee limited liability company (“we,” “us,” or “our”). These Terms govern your access to and use of all content, features, and services available on ContractorSoftwareHub.com.

1. Nature of Content — Editorial Opinion, Not Professional Advice

The content published on ContractorSoftwareHub.com consists of editorial reviews, comparisons, and opinions about contractor business software. All content reflects our independent research and editorial judgment.

Nothing on this Site constitutes professional advice of any kind, including but not limited to legal, financial, accounting, tax, or business advice. You should not rely on our content as a substitute for consultation with qualified professionals.

Software reviews and comparisons are based on our own research and analysis of publicly available information and user reviews at the time of publication. Individual experiences with any software product may vary significantly based on your business type, size, workflow, and other factors. We strongly encourage you to conduct your own due diligence before purchasing or subscribing to any software product.

2. Affiliate Disclosure

ContractorSoftwareHub.com participates in affiliate marketing programs. This means we may earn a commission when you click on certain links on our Site and subsequently make a purchase or sign up for a service. This comes at no additional cost to you.

Our affiliate relationships do not influence the editorial content we publish. We maintain editorial independence and will note negative aspects of products we review regardless of affiliate status.

For complete details about our affiliate relationships and how they work, please visit our Affiliate Disclosure page.

3. Accuracy of Information — Verify With Vendors

We make reasonable efforts to ensure that the information on this Site is accurate and current. However:

  • Software pricing, features, and availability change frequently
  • Promotions, free trials, and plan structures are subject to change by vendors at any time
  • Our reviews reflect the product as it existed at the time of writing or last update

You should always verify current pricing, features, terms, and availability directly with the software vendor before making any purchasing decision. We are not responsible for decisions made based on information that has changed since publication.

We update our content on a best-efforts basis and do not guarantee that any particular article reflects the current state of a product.

4. Intellectual Property

4.1 Our Content

All content on ContractorSoftwareHub.com — including but not limited to text, articles, reviews, comparisons, graphics, logos, and the Site’s overall look and feel — is owned by Contractor Software Hub LLC and is protected by applicable copyright, trademark, and intellectual property laws.

4.2 Limited License

We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to access and use the Site for your own personal, non-commercial purposes. This license does not permit you to:

  • Copy, reproduce, or republish our content in whole or substantial part without written permission
  • Scrape, crawl, or extract content from the Site in an automated manner
  • Use our content for commercial purposes without our prior written consent
  • Modify, create derivative works from, or sublicense our content

Short excerpts (a few sentences) may be quoted for purposes of commentary, criticism, or news reporting, provided that you clearly attribute the content to ContractorSoftwareHub.com and link back to the original article.

4.3 Third-Party Trademarks

Software product names, logos, and trademarks mentioned on this Site (such as Jobber, Housecall Pro, Service Fusion, and others) are the property of their respective owners. Their appearance on this Site does not imply any affiliation with or endorsement by us, nor does it imply any affiliation with or endorsement by those companies of our content.

5. No Warranties

THE SITE AND ALL CONTENT ARE PROVIDED ON AN “AS-IS” AND “AS-AVAILABLE” BASIS WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED.

To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, we disclaim all warranties, including but not limited to:

  • Implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement
  • Warranties that the Site will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free of viruses or other harmful components
  • Warranties regarding the accuracy, completeness, or reliability of any content on the Site

We do not warrant that any software product reviewed on this Site will meet your needs or expectations. All purchasing decisions are made at your own risk.

6. Limitation of Liability

TO THE FULLEST EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, CONTRACTOR SOFTWARE HUB LLC AND ITS MEMBERS SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES ARISING OUT OF OR RELATED TO YOUR USE OF THE SITE OR RELIANCE ON ITS CONTENT, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO:

  • Loss of profits or revenue
  • Loss of data or business information
  • Business interruption
  • Costs of substitute products or services
  • Any damages arising from your purchase of, subscription to, or use of any software product reviewed or recommended on this Site

THIS LIMITATION APPLIES REGARDLESS OF THE LEGAL THEORY UNDER WHICH DAMAGES ARE SOUGHT, AND EVEN IF WE HAVE BEEN ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGES.

IN JURISDICTIONS THAT DO NOT ALLOW THE EXCLUSION OR LIMITATION OF CERTAIN DAMAGES, OUR LIABILITY WILL BE LIMITED TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW.

7. Indemnification

You agree to defend, indemnify, and hold harmless Contractor Software Hub LLC and its members, officers, and assigns from and against any claims, liabilities, damages, losses, costs, and expenses (including reasonable attorneys’ fees) arising out of or in connection with:

  • Your use of or access to the Site
  • Your violation of these Terms
  • Your violation of any applicable law or regulation
  • Any content you submit to us (such as emails or feedback)

8. Third-Party Links and Services

The Site contains links to third-party websites, including the software vendors we review and affiliate program partners. These links are provided for your convenience and informational purposes only.

We do not control, endorse, or assume responsibility for the content, privacy practices, or terms of any third-party websites. Visiting third-party websites is at your own risk. We encourage you to review the terms and privacy policies of any third-party site you visit.

9. Prohibited Uses

When using this Site, you agree not to:

  • Use the Site for any unlawful purpose
  • Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the Site or its infrastructure
  • Interfere with or disrupt the operation of the Site
  • Use automated tools to scrape, crawl, or extract content in bulk
  • Reproduce or redistribute our content for commercial gain without written permission
  • Impersonate us or misrepresent your affiliation with us

10. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution

These Terms and any disputes arising from your use of the Site shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Tennessee, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

Any legal action or proceeding arising under these Terms shall be brought exclusively in the state or federal courts located in Tennessee, and you hereby consent to personal jurisdiction and venue in those courts.

We encourage you to contact us at chris@contractorsoftwarehub.com to resolve any disputes informally before pursuing formal legal action.

11. Changes to These Terms

We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. When we do, we will update the “Last Updated” date at the top of this page. We may also provide notice through the Site when changes are material.

Your continued use of the Site after any changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the revised Terms. If you do not agree to the revised Terms, you should stop using the Site.

12. Severability

If any provision of these Terms is found to be unenforceable or invalid under applicable law, that provision will be modified to the minimum extent necessary to make it enforceable, or severed if modification is not possible. The remaining provisions of these Terms will continue in full force and effect.

13. Entire Agreement

These Terms, together with our Privacy Policy and Affiliate Disclosure, constitute the entire agreement between you and ContractorSoftwareHub.com regarding your use of the Site and supersede any prior agreements or understandings on that subject.

14. Contact Us

If you have questions about these Terms, please contact us:

Contractor Software Hub LLC

Email: chris@contractorsoftwarehub.com

These Terms of Service were drafted on March 4, 2026 and govern use of ContractorSoftwareHub.com.
